query: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.sku, p.publicPriceHT, p.supplierProductCode, p.ean13, pv.id as variantId, pv.name as variantName, pv.sku as variantSku, pv.supplierProductCode as variantSupplierCode, pv.ean13 as variantEan13, pv.stockQuantity, pv.inTransitQuantity FROM products p LEFT JOIN product_variants pv ON pv.productId = p.id WHERE p.isActive = 1 LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KKo9odT1HVTXECY.26f2cde391d3 --database jX4Ppf2KXZ8z9Tppipem7T --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, p.sku, p.publicPriceHT, p.supplierProductCode, p.ean13, pv.id as variantId, pv.name as variantName, pv.sku as variantSku, pv.supplierProductCode as variantSupplierCode, pv.ean13 as variantEan13, pv.stockQuantity, pv.inTransitQuantity FROM products p LEFT JOIN product_variants pv ON pv.productId = p.id WHERE p.isActive = 1 LIMIT 10;
